dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 11, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Guardians' Dominant Effort Caps Off Night of Power Hitting"

The Cleveland Guardians took control of their game against the Los Angeles Angels, securing a 7-2 victory behind a strong team effort. Joey Cantillo earned the win with 6 shutout innings, striking out 4 Angels batters. Meanwhile, the Angels' offense was led by Nolan Schanuel, who went 2-for-3 with a run scored.

In the American League East, Coby Mayo's 3-RBI performance propelled the Baltimore Orioles to a 3-2 win over the New York Yankees. Mayo's 4th home run of the season was the difference-maker in the contest.

The Tampa Bay Rays used a strong team effort to take down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-5, with Andrés Giménez going yard twice and driving in 5 runs. Giménez's 5th home run of the season helped power the Rays to victory.

Across the league, other notable performances included Julio Rodríguez's 1-RBI home run for the Seattle Mariners and Rafael Devers' 2-RBI performance in the San Francisco Giants' 9-3 win over the Los Angeles Dodgers.

all_games.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Los Angeles Angels 7-2 behind Joey Cantillo's 6 shutout innings and Travis Bazzana's 2 RBI performance.
